name: union
description: Find the others — create groups with their own currencies

scripts.build: rsync -a --delete --exclude node_modules --exclude ios --exclude www --exclude .git --exclude .github --exclude .cursor --exclude docs --exclude sql --exclude supabase --exclude package.json --exclude package-lock.json --exclude capacitor.config.json --exclude CNAME --exclude README.md . www/
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync ios
